name: Ella Zeek's Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugars and shortening together.
2. Add milk, vanilla, and eggs to the mixture; mix well.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients until combined.
4. Refrigerate for about 1 hour.
5. Roll dough into small balls using floured hands.
6. Place each ball on a cookie sheet.
7. Press down with three fingers to flatten, leaving ridges in the center.
8. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 9-12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
Ella was a neighbor who was ten years older than God when I was a child. She always had these in her cookie jar, and usually would bake a dozen every day since the dough keeps so well. It is one of my all-time favorites and I have never tasted them anywhere else.
